name: Chicken Orleans
recipeIngredient: 1 can (small) onions, or 1 onion cut into chunks
Seasoned flour (add beau Monde and pepper to flour)
recipeInstructions:
1. Brush the chicken with lime juice.
2. Coat the chicken with seasoned flour.
3. Brown the chicken in a stick of butter.
4. Remove the chicken and add it back to the butter along with 1 clove of garlic, 1/2 cup of cooking sherry, and 1 can (15 ounces) of mushroom soup.
5. Place a layer of chicken in the casserole dish.
6. Sprinkle with parsley and rosemary.
7. Cover with sauce.
8. On top, place a stalk of cut celery and a small can of chopped onions.
9. Bake for 2 hours at 285-300°F, covering for the first hour.
10. Serve the sauce over rice.
